Build FIN-W — WINDOWING (DVD / STREAMING): after a film’s theatrical run closes, you decide when to send it to DVD / streaming on the Studio Financials screen. Rush to Home Video pays a smaller tail right away; the Standard Window is the neutral full tail a couple of months out; Hold for Premium grows the tail but you wait for it. The home-entertainment money now banks on the window you choose — holding longer vs cashing in early is a real call. Loading…
